verification_target: Ja'far ibn Muhammad al-Sadiq entry in Tahdhib al-Tahdhib
abaqat_citation: Vol 23, line 7181: ابن حجر عسقلانی در تهذيب بترجمة آنجناب كفته
issue: Entry for Ja'far al-Sadiq NOT FOUND in any of the 4 volumes. The OCR quality is poor and the volume arrangement may not match the standard 12-volume edition. Front matter confirmed but main biographical entries could not be located.
recommendation: Use waqfeya.net editions instead — they have 4 curated editions including the Indian edition (ط. الهند) which matches the Nasiriya Library copy Mir Hamid Husain used.
lesson: Archive.org copies may be incorrectly labeled, poorly OCR'd, or have non-standard volume arrangements. Waqfeya.net has better curated editions.
